text:
Comment on attachment 145435
Patch for 7.31

>Index: Makefile
>===================================================================
>--- Makefile    (revision 364242)
>+++ Makefile    (working copy)
>@@ -2,8 +2,7 @@
> # $FreeBSD$
>
> PORTNAME=      drupal7
>-PORTVERSION=   7.28
>-PORTREVISION=  1

> MASTER_SITES=  http://ftp.drupal.org/files/projects/
> DISTNAME=      drupal-${PORTVERSION}
